features.name: warlock-eldritch-patron-subclass
features.safe_summary: Choose your Otherworldly Patron at level 1. Your patron shapes your expanded spell list and grants subclass features at levels 1, 6, 10, and 14.
features.rules_summary: Choose your Otherworldly Patron at level 1. Your patron shapes your expanded spell list and grants subclass features at levels 1, 6, 10, and 14.

features.name: warlock-pact-magic
features.recovery: Pact Magic slots refresh on a Short or Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: Charisma-based spellcasting with a small number of spell slots that all recharge on a Short or Long Rest. Slots are always cast at your highest available pact slot level.
features.rules_summary: Charisma-based spellcasting with a small number of spell slots that all recharge on a Short or Long Rest. Slots are always cast at your highest available pact slot level.

features.name: warlock-eldritch-blast
features.safe_summary: A ranged spell attack that deals 1d10 Force damage at 120-foot range. Fires additional beams as you level: 2 beams at level 5, 3 at level 11, 4 at level 17. Roll a separate attack for each beam.
features.rules_summary: A ranged spell attack that deals 1d10 Force damage at 120-foot range. Fires additional beams as you level: 2 beams at level 5, 3 at level 11, 4 at level 17. Roll a separate attack for each beam.

features.name: warlock-eldritch-invocations-2
features.safe_summary: Learn 2 Eldritch Invocations at level 2. Gain one additional invocation at levels 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, and 19. You can replace one known invocation each time you gain a Warlock level.
features.rules_summary: Learn 2 Eldritch Invocations at level 2. Gain one additional invocation at levels 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, and 19. You can replace one known invocation each time you gain a Warlock level.

features.name: warlock-magical-cunning
features.safe_summary: As a Magic action, once per Long Rest, if you have no Pact Magic slots remaining you can regain half your maximum number of Pact Magic slots (rounded up).
features.rules_summary: As a Magic action, once per Long Rest, if you have no Pact Magic slots remaining you can regain half your maximum number of Pact Magic slots (rounded up).

features.name: warlock-pact-boon
features.safe_summary: Choose Pact of the Blade (summon a magical weapon as a Bonus Action), Pact of the Chain (cast Find Familiar with special familiar options; familiar can attack using your Reaction), or Pact of the Tome (gain a Book of Shadows with 3 cantrips from any class list).
features.rules_summary: Choose Pact of the Blade (summon a magical weapon as a Bonus Action), Pact of the Chain (cast Find Familiar with special familiar options; familiar can attack using your Reaction), or Pact of the Tome (gain a Book of Shadows with 3 cantrips from any class list).

features.name: warlock-mystic-arcanum-6th
features.safe_summary: Choose one 6th-level spell from the Warlock spell list. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. This spell is separate from your Pact Magic slots.
features.rules_summary: Choose one 6th-level spell from the Warlock spell list. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. This spell is separate from your Pact Magic slots.

features.name: warlock-cantrips-known-3
features.safe_summary: You now know 3 Warlock cantrips. Choose one additional cantrip from the Warlock spell list.
features.rules_summary: You now know 3 Warlock cantrips. Choose one additional cantrip from the Warlock spell list.

features.name: warlock-pact-slot-level-3
features.safe_summary: Your Pact Magic spell slots are now 3rd level. All spells cast using Pact Magic slots are automatically cast at 3rd level.
features.rules_summary: Your Pact Magic spell slots are now 3rd level. All spells cast using Pact Magic slots are automatically cast at 3rd level.

features.name: warlock-contact-patron
features.safe_summary: You can communicate directly with your patron. Use a Magic action to telepathically contact your patron — they can answer questions or offer guidance at the DM's discretion.
features.rules_summary: You can communicate directly with your patron. Use a Magic action to telepathically contact your patron — they can answer questions or offer guidance at the DM's discretion.

features.name: warlock-hex-master
features.safe_summary: You can cast Hex without expending a spell slot, and it no longer requires Concentration. Once cast this way, Hex lasts until dispelled or you finish a Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: You can cast Hex without expending a spell slot, and it no longer requires Concentration. Once cast this way, Hex lasts until dispelled or you finish a Long Rest.

features.name: warlock-eldritch-master
features.safe_summary: As a Magic action, spend 1 minute in earnest entreaty to your patron to regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots. Usable once per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: As a Magic action, spend 1 minute in earnest entreaty to your patron to regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots. Usable once per Long Rest.

features.name: warlock-asi-or-feat
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (neither above 20), or gain a feat you qualify for.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (neither above 20), or gain a feat you qualify for.

features.name: warlock-patron-feature-6
features.safe_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 6. The specific ability depends on your chosen patron.
features.rules_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 6. The specific ability depends on your chosen patron.

features.name: warlock-patron-feature-10
features.safe_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 10. The specific ability depends on your chosen patron.
features.rules_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 10. The specific ability depends on your chosen patron.

features.name: warlock-patron-feature-14
features.safe_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 14. This is the final feature in your patron's progression.
features.rules_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 14. This is the final feature in your patron's progression.

features.name: warlock-patron-feature-18
features.safe_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 18.
features.rules_summary: Your Otherworldly Patron grants you a subclass feature at level 18.

features.name: warlock-mystic-arcanum-7th
features.safe_summary: Choose one 7th-level spell from the Warlock spell list. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.
features.rules_summary: Choose one 7th-level spell from the Warlock spell list. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: warlock-mystic-arcanum-8th
features.safe_summary: Choose one 8th-level spell from the Warlock spell list. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.
features.rules_summary: Choose one 8th-level spell from the Warlock spell list. You can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: warlock-mystic-arcanum-9th
features.safe_summary: Gain a 9th-level Mystic Arcanum, your highest non-slot magical expression.
features.rules_summary: Gain a 9th-level Mystic Arcanum, your highest non-slot magical expression.

features.name: warlock-mystic-arcanum-improvement
features.safe_summary: One of your Mystic Arcanum options improves in reliability or impact.
features.rules_summary: One of your Mystic Arcanum options improves in reliability or impact.

features.name: warlock-cantrips-known-4
features.safe_summary: Your at-will package expands to four cantrips.
features.rules_summary: Your at-will package expands to four cantrips.

features.name: warlock-pact-slot-level-5
features.safe_summary: All pact slots now cast at level 5, maximizing each slot spend.
features.rules_summary: All pact slots now cast at level 5, maximizing each slot spend.

features.name: warlock-pact-slots-4
features.safe_summary: You now hold four pact slots between short rests.
features.rules_summary: You now hold four pact slots between short rests.

features.name: warlock-epic-boon
features.safe_summary: Claim an epic boon to capstone your warlock progression.
features.rules_summary: Claim an epic boon to capstone your warlock progression.

features.safe_summary: Choose one additional Eldritch Invocation at level 3.
features.rules_summary: Choose one additional Eldritch Invocation at level 3.
